note: Explore: re-altituded the 4 CLI-naming provision Givens in worktree.feature to the shipped provisionWorktree / WorktreeApi.provision seam; When/Then acceptance left byte-identical; added a band comment naming the surface. Suite parses (check:features 7/7).

cause: spec-judge round 1 blocked on governance pre-flight: inline spec-producer declared only the four fixed-universal governances and omitted its own resolved-actor bars (oracle-spec, builder-spec) for artifact-type behavioral. Loaded both bars, self-aligned against them, refiled the declaration; round 2 pre-flight passed.

spec-judge round 2 passed all three content lenses but rejected the conductor's edit-class handling: the Given rewrite was framed as an obvious stale-mistake conductor-served fix needing no re-open, whereas classify-edit-class.mts reports NARROWING and the trichotomy has no stale-mistake carve-out. Dropped that framing; re-ran the spec gate as a genuine re-open ratified by the mission mandate with Clearance run explicitly (byte-identical When/Then, gradient low/low/high). Also fixed a non-blocking Given-uniformity nit.
